skos:definition.@value: to move, be moved, be scattered
to make agitated, stir up, shake vehemently, &
to do harm, torment, distress, etc
in Bewegung; gerathen, zerstieben, sich auflösen; gehen, sich bewegen; gegangen
in Unstätigkeit, in Unruhe versetzen, aufregen, erschüttern
To afflict, torment; strike, hurt, kill;, see below
To move, be agitated or moved; be scattered (as dust); fly in pieces, dissolve. (The past participle is usually, but when the root is preceded by; ). (or )
To afflict, torment, distress;, To strike, hurt, injure, kill
To stir up, rouse, agitate, shake vehemently, make agitated or restless
To distort;. --WITH to torment excessively, fall upon or attack; to distress, afflict, pain, oppress; {#aByardito vfzal
„in innere Bewegung; gerathen“; zerstieben;; erschüttern, aufregen; schlagen, tödten, vernichten; in Bewegung setzen, fliessen machen,; zerstieben machen, vernichten

@graph.rdf:value:
<L>16095<pc>91,3<k1>ard<k2>ard<e>1
<s>ard</s> ¦ <lang>Ved.</lang> <ab>cl.</ab> 6. <ab>P.</ab> (<ab>Imper.</ab> 3. <ab>pl.</ab> <s>fdantu</s>; <ab>impf.</ab> 3. <ab>pl.</ab> <s>A/rdan</s>)
<div n="to"/>to move, be moved, be scattered (as dust), <ls>RV. iv, 17, 2</ls> and <ls n="RV.">vii, 104, 24.</ls> <ab>cl.</ab> 1. <ab>P.</ab> <s>ardati</s> (<s>a/rdati</s>, ‘to go, move’, <ls>Naigh.</ls>)
<div n="to"/>to dissolve, <ls>AV. xii, 4, 3</ls>, (<ab>aor.</ab> <s>ArdIt</s>, <ls>Bhaṭṭ.</ls>, <ab>perf.</ab> <s>Anarda</s>, <ls>Pāṇ. vii, 4, 71</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>)
<div n="to"/>to torment, hurt, kill, <ls>L.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to ask, beg for (<ab>acc.</ab>), <ls>Ragh. v, 17.</ls> <ab>cl.</ab> 7. <s>fRatti</s>, to kill, <ls>Naigh.</ls> :
<div n="vp"/><ab>Caus.</ab> <s>ardayati</s> (<ab>Subj.</ab> <s>ardayAsi</s>, <ab>Imper.</ab> 2. <ab>sg.</ab> <s>ardaya</s>, <ab>impf.</ab> <s>A/dayat</s>, 2. <ab>sg.</ab> <s>Arda/yas</s>; <ab>aor.</ab> <s>Ardidat</s>, or [after <s>mA</s>] <s>ardayIt</s>, <ls>Pāṇ. iii, 1, 51</ls>)
<div n="to"/>to make agitated, stir up, shake vehemently, <ls>AV. iv, 15, 6</ls> & <ls n="AV. iv, 15,">11</ls>; <ls n="AV.">vi, 49, 2</ls>, to do harm, torment, distress, <ls>MBh.</ls> &c. (generally used in <ab>perf.</ab> <ab>Pass.</ab> <ab>p.</ab> <s>ardita</s>, <ab>q.v.</ab>),
<div n="to"/>to strike, hurt, kill, destroy, <ls>RV.</ls>; <ls>AV.</ls> &c. <ab>Desid.</ab> <s>ardidizati</s>; <info whitneyroots="fd,15"/><info verb="genuineroot" cp="6P,1P,7"/>
<LEND>

<L>4174<pc>0168-b<k1>ard<k2>ard
{#ard#}¦ {c1c} <ab>P.</ab> [{#ardati, Anarda, ArdIt#}, <lbinfo n="a#rdituM"/>
{#ardituM, ardita#} or {#arRa#}] {@1@} To afflict, <lbinfo n="tor+ment"/>
torment; strike, hurt, kill; {#rakzaHsahasrARi#}
{#caturdaSArdIt#} <ls>Bk. 12. 56</ls>, see {%<ab>caus.</ab>%} below.
{@--2@} To beg, request, ask;  <lbinfo n="nirgalitAMbuga#rBaM"/>
{#nirgalitAMbugarBaM SaradGanaM nArdati cAtakopi#} <ls>R. 5. 17.</ls>
{@--3@} To go. {@--4@} To move, be agitated
or moved; be scattered (as dust);
fly in pieces, dissolve (<ab>Ved.</ab>). (The
past participle is usually {#ardita#}, but
{#arRa#} when the root is preceded by
{#aBi, ni, vi, saM#}; <ab>cf.</ab> <ls>P. VII. 2. 24-5</ls>).
{%--<ab>Caus.</ab>%} (or {c10c} <ab>P.</ab>) {@1@} ({%a%}) To afflict,
torment, distress; {#tata enaM#} <lbinfo n="mahAvegErarda#yAmAsa"/>
{#mahAvegErardayAmAsa tomarEH#} <ls>Mb.</ls>; {#kAmArdita, kopa˚#},
{#Baya˚#} &c. ({%b%}) To strike, hurt, <lbinfo n="in+jure"/>
injure, kill; {#yenArdidat dEtyapuraM pinAkI#}
<ls>Bk. 2. 46</ls>; <ls n="Bk.">9. 19</ls>; <ls n="Bk.">15. 90.</ls> {@--2@} To stir
up, rouse, agitate, shake <lbinfo n="vehement+ly"/>
vehemently, make agitated or restless. {@--3@} To
distort; {#ardayitvAnilo vaktramarditaM#} <lbinfo n="jana#yatyataH"/>
{#janayatyataH#} <ls>Suśruta</ls>. --WITH {#ati#} to <lbinfo n="tor+ment"/>
torment excessively, fall upon or <lbinfo n="at+tack"/>
attack; {#atyArdIt vAlinaH putraM#}  <lbinfo n="ls:Bk. 15.+ 115."/>
<ls>Bk. 15. 115.</ls> {#--aBi#} to distress, afflict, pain,
oppress; {#aByardito vfzalaH#} ({#SItena#} <lbinfo n="pIqi#taH"/>
{#pIqitaH#}) <ls>P. VII. 2. 25</ls> <ls>Sk.</ls> {#--ni#} <ab>Ved.</ab> to
stream forth, flow out. {#--pra#} to <lbinfo n="over+work"/>
overwork, to work or exert oneself <lbinfo n="be+yond"/>
beyond measure; to cause to flow away.
{#--prati#} to oppress or press hard in 
[Page0168-c+ 57]
return, assail in return, return an
attack. {#--vi#} <ab>Ved.</ab> to go or move
away; to oppress, harass, pain.
({%--<ab>caus.</ab>%}) to cause to be scattered
or dissolved, destroy, annihilate.
{#--saM#} {%<ab>caus.</ab>%} to pain greatly, wound,
distress.
<LEND>

<L>1059<pc>0114<k1>ard<k2>ard
{@√ard.@}¦ Erweiterung von ar (3. 4. 8. 9) {%„in innere Bewegung%} (der Theile) {%gerathen“; zerstieben;%} Causativ: 1〉 {%erschüttern, aufregen%} [<ab>A.</ab>]; 2〉 {%schlagen, tödten, vernichten%} [<ab>A.</ab>]. Causativ mit {@prá@}, {%in Bewegung setzen, fliessen machen,%} mit {@ví@}, {%zerstieben machen, vernichten%} [<ab>vgl.</ab> <lang>lat.</lang> ardeo, dessen Begriff aus dem der innern Erregung entspringt].
<div n="H">Stamm {@ṛda:@}
<div n="TS">-antu mū́radevās {620,24}.
<div n="H"><ab>Imperf.</ab> {@ā́rda:@}
<div n="TS">-an {313,2} (dhánvāni).
<div n="H">Stamm <ab n="des">d.</ab> <ab>Caus.</ab> {@ardáya@} (betont nur {187,1}; {1022,2}; <ls>AV. 4,15,6</ls>):
<div n="TS">-at {@ví:@} vṛtrám víparvam {187,1}.
<div n="TS">-as 2〉 vṛtrám {973,2}; atithigvám {1022,2}.<chg type="del" n="11" src="gra"><old>— {@prá:@} nī́cīs apásas {458,12}.</old></chg>
<div n="TS">-a [1〉 <ls>AV. 4,15,6</ls> udadhím] 2〉 amítram {684,10}. — {@ví:@} parirā́pas {214,14}.
<LEND>

<L>1040<pc>0051-b<k1>ard<k2>ard
{#ard#}¦ {%ARD,%} i. 1, <ab>Par.</ab> {@1.@} † To go. {@2.@}
To beg, <ls>Ragh.</ls> 5, 17. i. 1 and 10, <ab>Par.</ab>
and <ab>Ātm.</ab> {@1.@} To kill, <ls>Rām.</ls> 1, 16, 30.
{@2.@} To hurt; to wound, <ls>Pañc.</ls> 221, 13.
{@3.@} To afflict; to vex, <ls>Rām.</ls> 3, 14, 11;
53, 27. -- With the <ab>prep.</ab> {#ati#} {%ati.%} To
press violently, <ls>Bhaṭṭ.</ls> 15, 115. -- With
{#aBi#} {%abhi.%} To press; to afflict, <ls>Rām.</ls>
2, 21, 55; <ab>cf.</ab> {%abhyarṇṇa.%} -- With {#prati#}
{%prati.%} To press in return, <ls>Rām.</ls> 6, 92,
52. -- With {#vi#} {%vi.%} To press. {%a-vyarṇ-%}
{%ṇa.%} Not pressed, <ls>Bhaṭṭ.</ls> 9, 19. -- With
{#sam#} {%sam.%} To wound, <ls>MBh.</ls> 3, 761. --
<ab>Cf.</ab> perhaps <lang n="greek">ἀρδ</lang> in <lang n="greek">ἄρδις</lang>.
<LEND>
